method.fr: D'après les entrées/sorties de ce niveau sur le wiki source.

en.name: Level 15 — Futuristic Halls
en.shortDescription: A vast industrial complex of futuristic hallways full of strange machinery, abandoned laboratories and corpses in lab coats.
en.atmosphere: Eerie desolate facility, engine sounds echoing through white concrete corridors under unsettling artificial light.
en.tips: Explore cautiously and avoid the mysterious doorframe in the empty engine room. Watch your mental health on long stays.
